description: Korean Central Television  ( KCTV ;  Korean :  조선중앙텔레비죤 ;  MR :  Chosŏn Chungang T'ellebijyon ) is a North Korean television service operated by the  Korean Central Broadcasting Committee , a  state-owned broadcaster  in  North Korea . It is broadcast terrestrially via the  Pyongyang TV Tower  in  Moranbong-guyok ,  Pyongyang , streamed via the government-run  internet television  service  Manbang , and also uplinked via satellite.
subject: North Korea
title: KCTV
